docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,316.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT HASBERRY, ASHANTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL--COLLECTION SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASBERRY, ASHANTA $2,316.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,366.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
